name: John McGuire
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $576,037 for John McGuire in U.S. House, VA-05. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
